# Data Lakehouse Hub
> News, newsletters, and community for the data lakehouse ecosystem.

## Latest News & Analysis
- [Agentic Analytics Standards](https://datalakehousehub.com/): Latest coverage of agentic standards in the lakehouse
- [Catalog Wars Series](https://datalakehousehub.com/): Deep dives on Polaris, Unity, Gravitino, Lakekeeper
- [Newsletter Archive](https://amdatalakehouse.substack.com): Weekly data lakehouse newsletter

## Community
- [Data Lakehouse Hub Community](https://datalakehousehub.com): Slack community and events
- [Author Archive](https://datalakehousehub.com/author/alex-merced/): All articles by Alex Merced

## Key Topics
- Apache Iceberg ecosystem updates
- Apache Polaris and catalog interoperability  
- Agentic analytics and AI-driven data platforms
- Data lakehouse architecture best practices
